prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) with a **custom 3.5-inch titanium downpipe** (fabricated by **Armytrix**) to complement the **M838T E** 3.8L twin-turbo V8, pushing boost from 0.9 bar (stock) to 1.4 bar for ~750whp on **E85 fuel** (via **Motec M150 ECU** with **McLaren-specific flex-fuel mapping**).

Install **Pankl Racing Systems** forged internals (titanium connecting rods, **Mahle Motorsport** 9.5:1 forged pistons) with **ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs** and **Ferrea Racing** titanium intake/exhaust valves to handle 9,000 RPM reliably under **Motul 300V Trophy** 10W-60 oil.

Replace the stock **McLaren 7-speed SSG** with a **Xtrac P1227** 7-speed sequential transaxle (used in GT3 race cars) paired with a **Tilton triple-plate carbon clutch** and **AP Racing CP8460** 6-piston calipers clamping **Brembo HTC64T** 400mm carbon-ceramic rotors for sustained track abuse.
estetica: Fit a **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS** widebody kit (620R-specific, 50mm rear fender flares) with **custom carbon fiber side skirts** (hand-laid by **RML Group**) and a **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** front splitter with **active Gurney flap** (adjustable via **McLaren Track Telemetry System**).

Replace the stock **McLaren 19/20-inch forged alloys** with **BBS FI-R** 18x11 (front) and 18x12 (rear) wheels wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** 275/35R18 and 325/30R18 tires, paired with **Ohlins TTX40 MkII** 3-way adjustable coilovers (custom valved for the 620R’s **ProActive Chassis Control II** system).

Install a **Seibon Carbon** full dry carbon fiber roof, **custom titanium exhaust tips** (fabricated by **Novitec Torado**), and **LED taillights** (replica of the **McLaren Solus GT** units) with **carbon fiber rear diffuser** (designed by **RML Group** to work with the **Liberty Walk** aero package).
